info.longName: iShares Interest Rate Hedged U.S. Aggregate Bond ETF

funds_data.description: The underlying index is designed to minimize the interest rate risk exposure of a portfolio composed of U.S. dollar-denominated, investment-grade bonds. The fund seeks to achieve its investment objective by investing, under normal circumstances, at least 80% of its net assets, plus the amount of any borrowings for investment purposes, in component securities and instruments in the fund’s underlying index. It is non-diversified.

top_holdings.Name: iShares Core US Aggregate Bond ETF
BlackRock Cash Funds Treasury SL Agency
